problem id: 52a052a0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  11111110 -> 01110111
  00100000 -> 00000000
  00100010 -> 00010001
  01000111 -> 00100010
  01001101 -> 00100010
  00110100 -> 00000000
  01010011 -> 10001000
  01111000 -> 00000000

query: 00101111
predicted answer: 00010001
